card2.desc: You have less than 3 seconds to make a good impression. A website that loads slowly, doesn't work on mobile, or looks abandoned makes customers leave before reading anything.

consent.title: 🍪 Use of Cookies
consent.description: We use cookies to improve your browsing experience and analyze our website traffic. By accepting, you help us improve our services.

section1.title: 1. What are cookies?
section1.text: Cookies are small text files stored on your device (computer, tablet, or mobile) when you visit a website. Cookies are widely used to make websites work more efficiently, as well as to provide information to site owners.

section2.title: 2. What cookies do we use?
section2.text: At Corexia, we use the following types of cookies:
items: Essential cookies: Necessary for the basic functioning of the website. These include session and language preference cookies.
Performance cookies: Allow us to analyze how visitors use our website to improve its functionality. They collect information anonymously.
Functionality cookies: Allow us to remember choices you make (such as your preferred language) to provide a more personalized experience.
Marketing cookies: Used to track visitors across websites with the intention of displaying relevant and engaging advertisements to the individual user.

section3.title: 3. Third-party cookies
section3.text: Some of our partners and service providers may set cookies on your device when you visit our website. These third parties include web analytics services and external content providers. We have no control over the cookies these third parties set. We recommend you consult the privacy policies of these third parties for more information.

section4.title: 4. How to control cookies?
section4.text: You can control and/or delete cookies as you wish. You can delete all cookies already on your device and set most browsers to prevent them from being placed. However, if you do this, you may have to manually adjust some preferences every time you visit a site, and some services and functionalities may not work correctly.

section5.title: 5. Browser settings
section5.text: Most web browsers allow some control of cookies through browser settings. To find out more about cookies, including how to see what cookies have been set and how to manage and delete them, visit your browser settings.
items: Google Chrome: Settings > Privacy and security > Cookies
Mozilla Firefox: Options > Privacy and security
Microsoft Edge: Settings > Privacy, search, and services

section6.title: 6. Changes to this policy
section6.text: We may update this cookie policy periodically to reflect changes in the cookies we use or for other operational, legal, or regulatory reasons. We encourage you to review this page regularly to stay informed about our use of cookies.

section7.title: 7. Contact
section7.text: If you have questions about our cookie policy, you can contact us at hello@corexia.es or through our contact page.

hero.title: Web Design and SEO in Alicante
hero.description: Your website stops being an online brochure and becomes your best salesperson: it appears when someone searches for your service in Alicante, convinces the visitor, and converts them into a client. Without paying for ads every month.

trust.title: Alicante Businesses already ranking on Google with our websites

why.title: 89% of Your Customers Search for You on Google
why.titleHighlight: Do You Appear or Does Your Competition?
paragraphs: Alicante has more than 800,000 inhabitants and one of the densest SME networks in Spain. Hospitality, local commerce, clinics, academies, professional services — sectors where customers decide on Google before calling anyone.

The problem is not that they don't look for you. It's that they look for you and find someone else. Every day your website doesn't rank, that customer goes to a competitor with a faster, better-optimized website.
We have seen it with WeClean in Alicante and TaxiTime in Torrevieja: a technically well-built website with real local SEO starts generating visits in weeks, not years.
At Corexia, we build websites with Next.js directly from Alicante. We know the local market: the highest volume searches, the competition in each sector, and how to rank your business above others.

benefits.title: Your Competition in Alicante is Already Investing in Web Design
benefits.text: While you wait, your competitors are ranking on Google and capturing your potential customers. The digital gap between businesses in Alicante grows every month.

benefits.title: Local Searches Have High Purchase Intent
benefits.text: Someone searching for 'plumber Alicante' or 'beauty salon Alicante' wants to hire today. These are the searches we target with your website.

benefits.title: A Slow Website Loses 53% of Visits
benefits.text: Google penalizes slow websites in rankings. Our Next.js websites load in less than 1 second, retaining visits and ranking higher.

faq.title: Questions About Web Design and SEO in Alicante

questions.question: How much does a professional website cost in Alicante?
questions.answer: It depends on the project — not all businesses need the same thing. A presentation website for a local business has a very different cost than an online store or a custom platform. What we can guarantee is a fixed budget before starting: you know exactly what you get, how much it costs, and when it will be ready. No surprises, no hidden costs. Ask us for a quote — we'll respond in less than 48 hours.

questions.question: How long does it take for a website to rank on Google in Alicante?
questions.answer: The first local SEO results in Alicante start to be seen between 3 and 6 months after launch. In sectors with little digital competition — plumbing, cleaning, academies, professional services — results can come sooner. TaxiTime in Torrevieja today generates more than 415,000 annual impressions on Google with an average position of 4, starting from scratch. SEO is a medium-term investment, but once you rank, that traffic is constant and costs you nothing month to month.

questions.question: Do you only work with businesses in Alicante?
questions.answer: No — we have clients throughout Spain and work perfectly remotely. But we do have a special focus on Alicante and the province because we know the local market: the sectors with the most digital demand, the competition in each area, and the highest volume searches. If your business is in Alicante, Torrevieja, Elche, Benidorm, or Orihuela, we can also meet in person when you need it.

questions.question: My business already has a website, can you improve it?
questions.answer: It's one of the jobs we do most often. Most local business websites in Alicante have the same problems: they load slowly, are not mobile-optimized, and Google doesn't rank them. We analyze them, identify what's failing, and tell you exactly what can be improved — for free, without obligation. If we decide to work together, we modernize the website with current technology and optimize it to start generating organic visits.

questions.question: What does local SEO for businesses in Alicante include?
questions.answer: Research of local keywords for your sector in Alicante and province, technical optimization of your website, configuration and optimization of Google Business Profile, loading speed, and structured data so Google understands your business. All aimed at making you appear when someone searches for your service in Alicante — without paying for ads every month.

questions.question: Why choose a local agency in Alicante and not one from Madrid or Barcelona?
questions.answer: Because we know the market. We know what users in the province are looking for, which sectors have more digital competition, and how to rank for specific local searches. Plus, we can meet with you in person when you need it — something an agency 400km away cannot do. We have worked with businesses in Alicante, Torrevieja, and the Costa Blanca, and that shows in the results.

why.tag: Valencia, Ribera Alta and Nearby Areas
why.title: Ribera Alta and Valencia Are Full of Opportunity
why.titleHighlight: Especially If You Move Before Competitors
paragraphs: Valencia city has strong volume, but Ribera Alta holds highly profitable local demand: Alzira as the regional hub and towns like Algemesí, L'Alcúdia, Guadassuar, Carlet, Benifaió, and Carcaixent show buying-intent searches with less professional competition.
The recurring issue is clear: slow websites, weak local SEO structure, and generic messaging that does not connect with each town. A focused local strategy is what creates the gap.
Even without a published flagship case in Valencia yet, this can be your first-mover advantage: building a strong presence now in Alzira and Ribera Alta puts you ahead before others react.

We apply a validated methodology from real Alicante projects (performance, technical SEO, architecture, and conversion) adapted to Valencia and Ribera Alta to generate measurable business opportunities.

benefits.title: Local Positioning Focused on Alzira and Ribera Alta
benefits.text: We prioritize keywords and pages that capture real demand in your area, bringing nearby clients with clear hiring intent.

benefits.title: Area-Specific Messaging, Not Generic Website Copy
benefits.text: We tailor structure and content for Valencia and each key town, improving relevance and trust from the first visit.

benefits.title: Built to Scale Across the Province
